glosses.es: entrar en pánico; hacer entrar en pánico
glosses.de: in Panik geraten; in Panik versetzen
glosses.it: andare in panico; mandare nel panico
glosses.pt: entrar em pânico; deixar em pânico
glosses.nl: in paniek raken; in paniek brengen
glosses.da: gå i panik; bringe i panik
glosses.ja: パニックになる; パニックにさせる

sentences.target: Je panique un peu avant l'entretien.

translations.fr: Je panique un peu avant l'entretien.
translations.en: I panic a little before the interview.
translations.es: Me entra un poco de pánico antes de la entrevista.
translations.de: Ich gerate vor dem Vorstellungsgespräch ein bisschen in Panik.
translations.it: Mi prende un po' il panico prima del colloquio.
translations.pt: Eu entro um pouco em pânico antes da entrevista.
translations.he: אני קצת נכנס לפאניקה לפני הראיון.
translations.vi: Tôi hơi hoảng trước buổi phỏng vấn.
translations.ar: أشعر بقليل من الذعر قبل المقابلة.
translations.nl: Ik raak een beetje in paniek voor het sollicitatiegesprek.
translations.hi: इंटरव्यू से पहले मैं थोड़ा घबराता हूँ.
translations.el: Πανικοβάλλομαι λίγο πριν από τη συνέντευξη.
translations.nb: Jeg får litt panikk før intervjuet.
translations.sv: Jag får lite panik innan intervjun.
translations.ro: Mă ia puțin panica înainte de interviu.
translations.da: Jeg får lidt panik før interviewet.
translations.fi: Minulle tulee vähän paniikki ennen haastattelua.
translations.ja: 面接の前は少しパニックになります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject of the finite verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Indefinite article introducing the quantifier 'peu' in the set phrase 'un peu'.
Degree adverb meaning 'a little'; modifies the verb to indicate small intensity.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Common noun headed by elided definite article l'; object of the preposition 'avant'.

translations.es: Estás entrando en pánico por nada.
translations.de: Du gerätst wegen nichts in Panik.
translations.it: Stai andando in panico per niente.
translations.ko: 너는 별것도 아닌 일로 괜히 패닉에 빠지고 있어.
translations.pt: Você está entrando em pânico por nada.
translations.vi: Bạn đang hoảng hốt vì chẳng có gì.
translations.nl: Je raakt in paniek om niets.
translations.da: Du går i panik over ingenting.
translations.ja: 君は何もないことでパニックになっている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the object of the preposition 'pour'.

translations.de: Ich versuche, nicht in Panik zu geraten.
translations.it: Cerco di non andare nel panico.
translations.pt: Estou tentando não entrar em pânico.
translations.nl: Ik probeer niet in paniek te raken.
translations.hi: मैं घबराने से बचने की कोशिश कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg prøver å ikke få panikk.
translations.sv: Jag försöker att inte få panik.
translations.ro: Încerc să nu intru în panică.
translations.da: Jeg prøver at lade være med at gå i panik.
translations.ja: パニックにならないようにしている。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; 'J'' is elided clitic subject pronoun 'je' before a vowel.
Preposition linking the matrix verb to an infinitival complement.
Negation particle; first element of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas'.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne ... pas' negation.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of 'essayer de'; scoped by negation 'ne pas'.

sentences.target: Elles paniquent toujours avant les examens.

translations.fr: Elles paniquent toujours avant les examens.
translations.es: Ellas siempre entran en pánico antes de los exámenes.
translations.de: Sie geraten vor Prüfungen immer in Panik.
translations.it: Vanno sempre nel panico prima degli esami.
translations.ko: 그녀들은 시험 전에 항상 패닉에 빠져요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她们总是在考试前慌张。
translations.yue: 佢哋考試前成日都好慌。
translations.pt: Elas sempre entram em pânico antes das provas.
translations.he: הן תמיד נכנסות לפאניקה לפני הבחינות.
translations.tr: Onlar sınavlardan önce her zaman panik yaparlar.
translations.vi: Họ luôn hoảng trước kỳ thi.
translations.ar: هن دائمًا يصبن بالذعر قبل الامتحانات.
translations.nl: Ze raken altijd in paniek voor examens.
translations.hu: Ők mindig bepánikolnak a vizsgák előtt.
translations.hi: वे हमेशा परीक्षा से पहले घबरा जाती हैं.
translations.el: Πάντα πανικοβάλλονται πριν από τις εξετάσεις.
translations.nb: De får alltid panikk før eksamen.
translations.sv: De får alltid panik före proven.
translations.ro: Ele intră mereu în panică înainte de examene.
translations.da: De går altid i panik før eksamener.
translations.ja: 彼女たちはいつも試験の前にパニックになる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, feminine plural.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Temporal adverb of frequency modifying the verb.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, plural, introducing the noun 'examens'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'avant'.
